/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/collision.cpp.o -o main  /opt/homebrew/lib/libraylib.dylib -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
